{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/253-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Table of Contents"
tags:
  * anthropic
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _Why the Binary View Is Incomplete_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _Why the Binary View Is Incomplete_
2. _The Twenty-One Teachers Pattern_
3. _What Makes a Composite Skills Agent_
4. _The Sub-Agent Registry_
5. _Configuration: How Principals Build Their Ensembles_
6. _Coordination and Disagreement Resolution_
7. _Economics of Combinatorial Replication_
8. _Seven Domains of Application_
9. _Integration with OKWF Infrastructure_
10. _Risks Specific to Composite Architectures_
11. _Open Questions_
12. _Call for Collaboration_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[211-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.26)
* [[169-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.21)
* [[137-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.15)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[211-table-of-contents]]
* [[169-table-of-contents]]
* [[308-table-of-contents]]
* [[137-table-of-contents]]


h2. Упоминается в

* [[254-1-why-the-binary-view-is-incomplete|1. Why the Binary View Is Incomplete]]
* [[255-2-the-twenty-one-teachers-pattern|2. The Twenty-One Teachers Pattern]]
* [[256-3-what-makes-a-composite-skills-agent|3. What Makes a Composite Skills Agent]]
* [[258-5-configuration-how-principals-build-their-ensembl|5. Configuration: How Principals Build Their Ensembles]]
* [[259-6-coordination-and-disagreement-resolution|6. Coordination and Disagreement Resolution]]
* [[252-abstract|Abstract]]
* [[270-appendix-b-sub-agent-registry-schema-sketch|Appendix B: Sub-Agent Registry Schema (Sketch)]]
* [[149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions|Appendix B: Summary of Contributions]]
* [[271-appendix-c-configuration-template-example|Appendix C: Configuration Template Example]]
* [[137-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[154-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[169-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[211-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[308-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]
h2. Упоминается в

* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]


h2. Связанные документы

* [[254-1-why-the-binary-view-is-incomplete|1. Why the Binary View Is Incomplete]] _33%_
* [[252-abstract|Abstract]] _29%_
* [[255-2-the-twenty-one-teachers-pattern|2. The Twenty-One Teachers Pattern]] _29%_
* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]] _25%_
* [[259-6-coordination-and-disagreement-resolution|6. Coordination and Disagreement Resolution]] _21%_
* [[149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions|Appendix B: Summary of Contributions]] _17%_
* [[169-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]] _17%_
* [[190-содержание|Содержание]] _17%_
h2. Связанные документы

* [[211-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]] _33%_
* [[254-1-why-the-binary-view-is-incomplete|1. Why the Binary View Is Incomplete]] _33%_
* [[252-abstract|Abstract]] _29%_
* [[256-3-what-makes-a-composite-skills-agent|3. What Makes a Composite Skills Agent]] _29%_
* [[271-appendix-c-configuration-template-example|Appendix C: Configuration Template Example]] _29%_

* [[169-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]] _25%_
